reasoning: The control AC-6(5) focuses on enforcing least privilege for privileged accounts, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC configurations. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by ensuring that ClusterRoles and Roles are not overly permissive, particularly avoiding the use of the 'cluster-admin' role. Additionally, RoleBindings and ClusterRoleBindings should be configured to enforce least privilege by granting only the necessary permissions to users and service accounts. These checks ensure that privileged access is restricted according to the principle of least privilege.
title: Least Privilege - Least privilege | privileged accounts restrict privileged accounts on the system
